prompt: In this cash flop spot, choose bet.
why_v1: Bet denies equity when many worse hands can fold.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Betting fits the track cue set, so the line presses value or denial before a passive check gives the edge away.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Bet because a simple flop value spot should charge worse hands before free cards flatten the cash edge.
